entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -
[info] loaded in 4.10 secs at 2026-05-19T16:53:11 - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1430725/000114036125029050/gsl-20250630.htm
[xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.119780. - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1430725/000114036125029050/gsl-20250630.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0179.10144 - 16:53:19.846867 - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1430725/000114036125029050/gsl-20250630.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1430725/000114036125029050/gsl-20250630.htm - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1430725/000114036125029050/gsl-20250630.htm

[DQC.US.0179.10144] The element DividendsPayableAmountPerShare has a value of 0.45 at 2024-08-05. This represents the amount of dividends that are payable per share at 2024-08-05. However, the payment date associated with the dividend has passed. The payment date associated with the dividend is 2024-03-06. To resolve the issue the value of the context for DividendsPayableAmountPerShare should be changed to the declaration date or the value of DividendsPayableDateOfRecordDayMonthAndYear or DividendsPayableDateToBePaidMonthAndYear should be changed to reflect the date the dividend will be paid. If the payment date relates to a seperate dividened distribution unrelated to DividendsPayableAmountPerShare then the value of 2024-03-06 should be reported using the DividendsAxis.
The properties of us-gaap:DividendsPayableAmountPerShare are: Period :2024-08-05 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=us-gaap:CommonClassAMember
Rule Element Id:10144 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - gsl-20250630.htm 14534

[DQC.US.0179.10144] The element DividendsPayableAmountPerShare has a value of 0.45 at 2024-08-05. This represents the amount of dividends that are payable per share at 2024-08-05. However, the payment date associated with the dividend has passed. The payment date associated with the dividend is 2024-06-03. To resolve the issue the value of the context for DividendsPayableAmountPerShare should be changed to the declaration date or the value of DividendsPayableDateOfRecordDayMonthAndYear or DividendsPayableDateToBePaidMonthAndYear should be changed to reflect the date the dividend will be paid. If the payment date relates to a seperate dividened distribution unrelated to DividendsPayableAmountPerShare then the value of 2024-06-03 should be reported using the DividendsAxis.
The properties of us-gaap:DividendsPayableAmountPerShare are: Period :2024-08-05 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=us-gaap:CommonClassAMember
Rule Element Id:10144 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - gsl-20250630.htm 14534
